plugins.name: sdlt-calculator
plugins.description: Calculate UK Stamp Duty Land Tax for residential property purchases. Standard, first-time buyer, additional property, and non-UK resident calculations.

plugins.name: lenders-handbook-prescreen
plugins.description: Exhaustive UK Finance Lender's Handbook Part 1 pre-screen with 90+ checks across 24 categories, plus Part 2 data for 60+ lenders.

plugins.name: lease-impact-advisor
plugins.description: Leasehold saleability assessment — risk banding, lender eligibility matrix for 13 major lenders, extension cost estimates, marriage value analysis.

plugins.name: restrictive-covenant-advisor
plugins.description: Assess impact and enforceability of freehold restrictive covenants — Hepworth v Pickles 20-year rule, indemnity insurance, retrospective consent, and s.84 LPA 1925 Upper Tribunal applications.

plugins.name: title-defect-advisor
plugins.description: Analyse HM Land Registry Official Copy Registers (Title Deeds) for conveyancing risks, defects, and critical information — covenants, charges, title class, and risk summaries.
